title: dacryodes rugosa var. rugosa
intro: Dacryodes rugosa var. rugosa, also known as the Canarium or Bitter Ash, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dacryodes rugosa var. rugosa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, nausea, and stomach pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
